name: Duck Sauce Jam 2026
description: Duck Sauce Jam is our annual game jam held in Glasgow, Scotland. You'll have 48 hours to come up with an idea and build a video or board game around a specific theme that will be announced in the opening ceremony. We aim to make this event accessible to all so don't worry if you've never attended a jam before.
short_description: A 48-hour game jam in Glasgow open to all — build a video or board game around a surprise theme.
